PromotionsPage.metaTitle: Medical promotions in Houston, TX | Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud
PromotionsPage.metaDescription: Affordable medical packages in Houston, TX: women's intimate health, blood panel with vitamin B12 and men's hormone panel. Care in Spanish, walk-ins welcome and no insurance needed.
PromotionsPage.title: Our clinic's promotions
PromotionsPage.subtitle: Affordable medical packages with care 100% in Spanish. Walk-ins welcome and no insurance needed.
PromotionsPage.faq1Q: How long are these promotions available?
PromotionsPage.faq1A: These are limited-time promotions and subject to availability. We recommend calling us or filling out the form to confirm the current price before your visit.
PromotionsPage.faq2Q: Do I need an appointment or insurance?
PromotionsPage.faq2A: No. We welcome walk-ins and you don't need insurance: these are affordable direct-pay prices. We also speak Spanish.
PromotionsPage.faq3Q: How do I book a promotion?
PromotionsPage.faq3A: Call us, get directions, or fill out the contact form with the service you're interested in and we'll reach out to coordinate your visit.
PromotionsPage.formSubtitle: Leave us your details and the service you're interested in. We'll contact you to confirm the price and coordinate your visit.

Gynecology.title: Gynecology Consultation in Spanish
Gynecology.body: We care for your health at every stage with comprehensive gynecological care, with the privacy and respect you deserve. Pap smears, checkups and guidance, all in your language.

MensHealth.title: Men's Health Exams in Spanish
MensHealth.body: We care for your health with key men's exams: prostate antigen (PSA), testosterone and a general checkup, with results explained in your language.
